name: ai-plot-twist
description: Closed-beta social-narrative daily-cycle AI game. MVP under construction.

scripts.install: echo 'Use "pnpm install" (the built-in). This entry exists so the command is discoverable via "pnpm run". Python deps install via the postinstall hook.'
scripts.dev: pnpm db:up && pnpm migrate && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names api,web --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "pnpm --filter ./apps/api dev" "pnpm --filter ./apps/web dev"
scripts.db:up: node scripts/check-docker.mjs && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.dev.yml up -d postgres
scripts.db:reset: pnpm db:down && (docker volume rm aiplottwist_pgdata || true) && pnpm db:up && pnpm migrate
